templates.name: AdGuard Home
templates.description: Network-wide DNS-based ad and tracker blocker with adguardhome-sync for replicating configuration across multiple AdGuard Home instances.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: ArchiSteamFarm
templates.description: Steam card farming application that idles games to collect trading cards, bundled with ASFClaim for claiming free packages and ASFScan for Reddit giveaway scanning.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Audiobookshelf
templates.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server with a companion mobile app, streaming support, and progress syncing across devices.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Autoheal
templates.description: Watches Docker container health status and automatically restarts any containers that fail their healthcheck, improving service reliability.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Crosswatch
templates.description: A media synchronization engine that keeps your Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, SIMKL, Trakt, AniList, TMDb, MDBList and Tautulli in sync with watchlist, ratings, and progress tracking.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Dozzle
templates.description: Lightweight real-time log viewer for Docker containers with a web UI, live streaming, search, and multi-host support.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Homepage
templates.description: A highly customizable application dashboard with service integrations, widgets, and bookmarks for organizing your self-hosted services.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Joal
templates.description: Open-source torrent ratio faker that spoofs upload stats to trackers, with an optional web UI for managing active torrents and client profiles.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Kometa
templates.description: Automated Plex metadata manager that creates collections, playlists, and overlays from external sources, paired with ImageMaid for stale image cleanup.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Linkwarden
templates.description: Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager that archives web pages, organizes links with tags and collections, and preserves content for offline access.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: OpenGist
templates.description: Self-hosted pastebin and code snippet sharing tool powered by Git, offering syntax highlighting, public/private gists, and an embeddable interface.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Plex
templates.description: Full-featured Plex media server stack with Tautulli (analytics), PlexAutoLanguages (audio/subtitle automation), PlexAniBridge (Plex-to-AniList sync), PlexTraktSync (Trakt sync), Zurg and Rclone (cloud media mounting), and Tunarr (live TV channels).
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: PostgreSQL
templates.description: PostgreSQL relational database server paired with pgbackweb for scheduled backups, restore management, and backup monitoring via a web interface.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Servarr
templates.description: Full Servarr media automation stack including Prowlarr (indexer management), Radarr (movies), Sonarr (TV), Recyclarr (quality profiles), and Flaresolverr (Cloudflare bypass).
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Speedtest Tracker
templates.description: Self-hosted internet speed test tracker that runs scheduled tests via Ookla's Speedtest service and logs historical results with charts and statistics.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: SteamGifts Bot
templates.description: Automated bot that browses and enters SteamGifts giveaways based on configurable filters, maximizing chances of winning free Steam games.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Swag + CrowdSec + Authelia + DDClient
templates.description: Hardened reverse proxy stack using SWAG (Nginx + Let's Encrypt), CrowdSec (threat detection), Authelia (SSO/MFA authentication), and DDClient (dynamic DNS updates).
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: TwitchDropsMiner
templates.description: Automated Twitch Drops miner that watches eligible streams and claims in-game rewards without manual interaction.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Uptime Kuma
templates.description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring tool that tracks service availability, sends multi-channel notifications, and generates public status pages.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Wallos
templates.description: Self-hosted subscription and expense tracker to monitor recurring payments, visualize spending, and manage budgets across multiple currencies.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Watchtower
templates.description: Automatically monitors and updates running Docker containers to the latest available image versions on a configurable schedule.
templates.author: JourneyOver

templates.name: Yamtrack
templates.description: Self-hosted media tracker for movies, TV shows, anime, manga, games, and books with support for multiple tracking sources.
templates.author: JourneyOver
